title: arenaria ciliata var. moehringioides
intro: Arenaria ciliata var. moehringioides is a perennial plant in the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae), commonly known as sandwort. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating various skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including soothing skin irritations and reducing inflammation. Arenaria ciliata var. moehringioides is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in topical applications, such as salves and ointments, for its therapeutic effects.
